chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1513 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 17.01.2023 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General along with SIP/SIO Sultan Ali Mallah, Police Picket, Police Station Khuhra..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. Investigation Officer of F.I.R. No.70 of 2022 registered at Police Station Khuhra, Taluka Gambat is present and files his statement as well as statement of Incharge Police Picket Baharo, Police Station Khuhra to the effect that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 under Section 161, Cr.P.C. in aforementioned crime/F.I.R, wherein she has stated that she contracted love marriage with petitioner No.2 as per Muhammadan Law and her sweet wish; neither she is abducted nor kidnaped by any person and the F.I.R. is false one. Investigation Officer states that he has submitted final report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. recommending disposal of aforementioned F.I.R. under ‘C’ class for approval before the IIIrd Judicial Magistrate, Gambat. Perhaps, grievance of the petitioners has been redressed; therefore, they are not in attendance. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
